paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, with a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the price change is -36.32 percent. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits reading "Fermi Has Zero Revenue And A $486M Loss – So Why Is Retail Still Bullish On FRMI Stock?" The article mentions that the company expects to sign binding agreements with tenants over the next year.

There are 25 total filings in the feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and an 8-K form on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records.
